items.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq futures slide after bruising day for tech
items.description: Target earnings and Fed minutes are on deck, watched for clues to prospects for the economy and interest rates.

items.title: Tech Experiences Slight Selloff, Dow Ekes +10 Points
items.description: The Dow closed the session up +10 points, +0.02%, while the Nasdaq shed -314 points on the day, -1.46%.

items.title: Heard on the Street Recap: Big Tech Stumbles, Markets Fall
items.description: Big tech made its weight felt Tuesday as a notable decline among megacap tech stocks pushed major indexes into the red.  The eight companies valued at more than $1 trillion lost a combined $385 billion in market capitalization for the day.

items.title: Tracking Ken Fisher's Fisher Asset Management Portfolio - Q2 2025 Update
items.description: Fisher Asset Management's 13F portfolio grew from ~$231B to ~$252B in Q2 2025. Click here to read more about the trades and holdings in the portfolio.

items.title: Case Study Uncovers Major Gap in Sliding Screen Doors
items.description: When industry veteran Steve Tristan, founder of BestCustomScreens.com, set out to answer a simple but persistent homeowner's question—"Where can I buy an 8-foot fully assembled sliding screen door?"—he uncovered a revealing gap in the U.S. home improvement market.
